# Issue Title

Add automated preview screenshot generation

## Description

Add a repeatable way to generate light and dark screenshots from each standalone `preview.html`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Add a script or documented workflow for generating screenshots.
- [ ] Support light and dark theme URLs.
- [ ] Save screenshots with consistent file names.
- [ ] Document any required local dependencies.
- [ ] Do not add generated screenshots unless they are intentionally updated.

## Suggested Labels

`developer-experience`, `tooling`, `screenshots`
